probes.description: Verify hpst-basis.schema.json contains executionAllowed: const false
probes.expectedOutcome: Property executionAllowed has const false and is listed in required array

probes.description: Verify verifier-microtask.schema.json enumerates exactly the five permitted taskType values
probes.expectedOutcome: enum contains exactly: schema_validation, example_review, negative_fixture_check, coverage_gap_analysis, proof_audit

probes.description: Score the quality of field descriptions across all schemas
probes.expectedOutcome: Each required field has a meaningful title or description; score >= 0.8

probes.description: Check negative fixture agent-gradecard-no-evidence.invalid.json triggers minItems violation
probes.expectedOutcome: Validator reports minItems error on evidenceRefs path
